name: Caviar, Dill and Purple Onion Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened cream cheese and sour cream in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add lemon juice, dried dill, and diced purple onion to the mixture.
3. Blend well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
5. Just before serving, finely chop an egg and sprinkle over the dip as garnish.
Makes about 1 1/2 cups of dip. Suggested Dippers: Cocktail Rye Bread, Toast Triangles, Cucumber, Turnips, Red Bell Peppers Strips.
